name: templates/icon-grid
description: Compact icon-tile grid template for 4-6 short items.

usage: Paste snippet HTML inside .ls-deck and copy its registryDependencies before use.
Use .ls-grid--3 for 5-6 items and .ls-grid--2 for 4 items; keep each tile to one title and one sentence.

composition.itemCountGuidance: 4-6 short items; for 3 richer points use templates/three-cards, for one-liner rows use templates/feature-rows.
composition.copyGuidance: One title plus one sentence per tile; icons carry the visual weight.
avoidWhen: each item needs 2-4 sentences or a visual
there are more than 6 items (split across two slides instead)

alternatives.when: 3 items with 2-4 sentences or visuals each
3-5 one-liner points that read as a list

useCases: Present 4-6 short capabilities, features, or facts as compact tiles.
